howItWorks.intro: This nda penalty calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Estimated Damages
rules.formula: Damages = Trade Secret Value × Severity Factor (or Liquidated Amount)
rules.explanation: Fraction of trade secret value based on breach severity.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Can include actual damages, lost profits, unjust enrichment, and sometimes punitive damages.
A pre-agreed damage amount specified in the NDA contract.
